{{Quote|I agree the man's a scum sorter. That doesn't change the fact we can't take on three hundred armed men by ourselves.|[[Taxtro Grave]]|<ref name="Allegiance (novel)">[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]</ref>}}
'''Cav'Saran''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Police officer/Legends|Patroller]] [[Patroller Chief|Chief]] of [[Janusar]] on [[Ranklinge]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], he took power eight [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before then, and confiscated all weapons within a 200-[[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] radius. As no [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ships came by [[Ranklinge]], it made him and his [[Police officer/Legends|enforcers]] the effective masters of the [[City/Legends|city]]. He had connections with [[BloodScar]], who set him up to steal [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] I-7 attack [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. He was killed by the [[Hand of Judgment]] after a couple of his patrollers and the rest were arrested by former incorruptible members, including Colonel [[Atmino]].

{{Char-stub}}
